reviews.comment:

Always excellent service from the people at ACA. Congratulations! 👍❤️👏

reviews.comment:
esas fotos no tienen nada que ver con el ACA de San Clemente,esa es una estacion bandera blanca que esta en la entrada a la localidad

(Translated by Google)
Those photos have nothing to do with the ACA in San Clemente; that's a white-flag station located at the entrance to the town.

reviews.comment:
En esta temporada esta repasada de trabajo y largas filas, por el hecho que la ypf de la ruta está en  reparación de sus tanques.

(Translated by Google)
This season is marked by heavy workloads and long lines, due to the fact that the YPF station on the route is undergoing tank repairs.

reviews.comment:

Tiene gas  , un kiosco, etc es una estación con lo básico..

reviews.comment:
15 Enero 2024. 3cuadras de fila bajo el sol. Decian tener nafta en un solo surtidor. Mentira. La gente se quejaba y habilitaron todos. El que me atendio, muyyy mal educado y el que cobraba con las tarjetas, mas lento que una marmota. Cero dinamismo. Pocas ganas de trabajar.

(Translated by Google)
January 15, 2024. Three blocks of line under the sun. They claimed to have gas at a single pump. Lie. People complained, so they opened them all. The person who served me was very rude, and the one collecting credit cards was slower than a log. Zero dynamism. Little desire to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOeWEzdThRRRAB
